purpose: Deep-dive research on Diffbot and Sumble for lead-gen pipeline integration

diffbot.summary: 10B+ entity knowledge graph with custom fine-tuned LLMs. 13 HF models across 4 architecture families.

enhance.output: Full KG record with all ontology fields

qwen3_next.unique: Hybrid linear+full attention (full every 4th layer), linear_conv_kernel_dim=4, partial_rotary_factor=0.25

glm4_moe_lite.unique: DeepSeek-style MLA (Multi-head Latent Attention), KV LoRA rank 512, Q LoRA rank 768

hf_models.note: HF models are code/general-purpose LLMs, NOT entity extraction models. For entity extraction, their NL API is the value — cannot replicate with HF models alone.

buy_api: KG company enrichment by domain (Enhance API, $0.025/company)
build_local: General entity extraction using 8B GGUF on M1 Metal
Tool-use integration using XML format from their parsers
integration_verdict.cannot_replicate: 10B entity knowledge graph with 1T facts — accumulated over years of crawling 1.2B websites

sumble.summary: Technographic intelligence from job postings. LongFormer NER extracts TEAM and TECH entities. 2.6M companies.

training.note: Only 10 training steps — this is a test checkpoint, not production model

dataset.schema: input (job posting text) + output (extracted company names) + instruction (few-shot NER prompt)
dataset.note: Dataset targets COMPANY extraction, but NER model labels are TEAM+TECH — multi-stage pipeline confirmed

technical_approach.source: Anthony Goldbloom (Arize AI podcast) + Ben Hamner (Hacker News)
technical_approach.method: GPT-4 for labeling/annotation → fine-tune LongFormer on ~500 labels using single T4 GPU in ~1 hour
technical_approach.database: Relational tables (PostgreSQL/AlloyDB), NOT graph database despite 'knowledge graph' branding

buy_api: People/find for contact discovery with tech filters
build_own: Fine-tune own LongFormer NER on job postings from linkedinPosts table (Sumble's approach is replicable)
integration_verdict.cannot_replicate: 2.6M company coverage with historical tech adoption trends

discovery.diffbot: KG search for companies matching ICP criteria (DQL query with industry/size/tech filters)
discovery.sumble: Find companies adopting target technologies via /v5/organizations/find

enrichment.diffbot: Enhance API: domain → full company profile (financials, employees, technographics, classifications). Store as companyFacts with source_type=DIFFBOT_KG
enrichment.sumble: Enrich API: domain → department-level tech stack. Store as companyFacts with source_type=SUMBLE_TECH

contacts.diffbot: KG Person search: find executives by employment at target company
contacts.sumble: People/find: professionals by role/seniority at target company. People/enrich: email/phone for 10 credits

intent_signals.diffbot: KG monitors funding events, M&A, executive changes. Map to intentSignals with signal_type=growth_signal|leadership_change
intent_signals.sumble: Job posting velocity = hiring_intent. New tech adoption in postings = tech_adoption

diffbot_kg_enrichment.reason: 10B entity KG is unreplicable. $0.025/company via Enhance API. 250K credits = 10K companies for $299/mo.

diffbot_entity_extraction.reason: 8B GGUF runs on M1 Metal. Good for extracting entities from our own crawled content. Cheaper than $0.001/10K chars API.

sumble_technographics.reason: Department-level tech signals across 2.6M companies is unique data. $99/mo for 9,900 credits.

sumble_ner_approach.reason: Fine-tune own LongFormer on job postings from linkedinPosts table. TEAM+TECH labels. Single T4 GPU, ~1 hour. Sumble's HF model is only a test checkpoint (10 steps).
